headlines.h: Weather Alert: So, you have chosen death!”
headlines.b: Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.

headlines.h: Exclusive: Government Announces New Standard: “She’s giving Willem DaFoe"
headlines.b: Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).
The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.

headlines.h: Opinion: Joining the battle right after waking up (And You Know It)
headlines.b: Experts urge humans to stop taking it personally and start providing snacks.
